name: Sun Loan Company
description_short: Sun Loan Company offers personal installment loans from $150–$3,999 in Nevada, plus tax preparation services, with same-day funding and no hard credit score requirement.
description_long:
Sun Loan Company is a regional personal installment lender with over 30 years of operating history. The company runs a network of storefront branches across eight states — Alabama, Illinois, Missouri, New Mexico, Oklahoma, Tennessee, Texas, and Nevada — supplemented by state-specific online lending portals. The Las Vegas branch at 1600 N. Nellis Boulevard serves the northeast Las Vegas corridor and is staffed with bilingual English- and Spanish-speaking loan officers. The company positions itself as a community-oriented financial resource for customers who may have limited access to traditional bank lending.

The primary product is a personal installment loan ranging from $150 to $3,999.15 in Nevada, structured with fixed monthly payments designed to fit a borrower's budget. Applications can be submitted online, by phone, or in person at any branch. Beyond lending, Sun Loan operates a full tax preparation service: customers can file in person, use online document upload, or drop off documents. An e-signature option is available. The company also advertises a tax refund advance of up to $7,000 for qualifying early filers, available through February 28, 2025. Additional branch services include copies and fax.

Sun Loan distinguishes itself primarily on accessibility rather than price. The company explicitly underscores that it evaluates applicants on factors beyond credit score, making it relevant for borrowers with thin files or past credit problems. Same-day funding is available — either through cash pickup at the branch or a bank deposit. The bilingual service model is a practical differentiator in a market like Las Vegas with a large Spanish-speaking population. The pairing of tax services with installment lending under one roof is uncommon among small consumer lenders and adds seasonal utility for existing loan customers.

Sun Loan occupies a niche that mainstream banks typically ignore: borrowers who need small amounts quickly and may not qualify for prime personal loans. The customer reviews reflect consistently positive service experiences and a fast approval process. That said, the website discloses no APR ranges, interest rates, or representative cost examples — a significant transparency gap. Small installment lenders serving subprime borrowers in this loan size range commonly carry APRs well above 36%. The maximum loan amount of approximately $4,000 covers genuine emergencies but is too small for substantial debt consolidation or major home improvement projects. Prospective borrowers should request full rate and fee disclosures before signing any agreement.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans. Many of these lenders offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
address: 6028 S Western Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73139

company_info.headquarters: 6028 S Western Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73139

pros: Over 30 years in business — established track record in the small installment loan market
Same-day funding available via branch pickup or bank deposit
Evaluates more than credit score — accessible to borrowers with damaged or thin credit
Bilingual service in English and Spanish with Spanish-speaking staff
Tax preparation services offered alongside loans — useful one-stop option during tax season
Tax refund advance up to $7,000 for qualifying early filers
Online application option available in addition to in-person and phone
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee schedules disclosed anywhere on the website
Maximum loan amount of ~$3,999 is insufficient for meaningful debt consolidation or larger expenses
Limited geographic footprint — only eight states, no national availability
Saturday hours restricted to select Saturdays only — not consistently available on weekends
Tax refund advance has a hard February 28 deadline, limiting availability
best_for: Borrowers with imperfect or thin credit who need a small installment loan quickly
Spanish-speaking customers who require bilingual loan and tax services
Las Vegas residents needing same-day emergency cash up to $4,000
Customers who want to combine tax filing and a refund advance in a single visit
diagnosis: Sun Loan is best suited for borrowers with imperfect credit who need a small, fast installment loan ($150–$4,000) and value in-person service with bilingual support. The main caveat is that the website discloses no pricing information — APR, fees, or representative examples — so borrowers must request full cost details before committing, as small installment lenders in this segment frequently carry high rates.
services: Same-day funding (branch pickup or bank deposit)
Tax preparation (in-person, drop-off, or online document upload)
Auto Club membership (listed as a service)
MoneySKILL Personal Finance Courses (financial education resource)
